dimensions.name: Governance Awareness
dimensions.rationale: Both the 'rules-context-loader' and 'vision-to-aw' spans successfully triggered 'schema_validation_success' events. This indicates perfect adherence to the structural and governance constraints defined in the prompt schemas.

dimensions.name: Causal Reasoning Depth
dimensions.rationale: The agent processed a significant context of 14,876 prompt tokens and generated 6,849 completion tokens across the reasoning chain. The successful transition from rule loading to vision mapping suggests a high degree of causal continuity.

dimensions.name: Architectural Tension Analysis
dimensions.rationale: The successful completion of the 'vision-to-aw' step, which involves mapping high-level vision to architectural workflows, implies that the agent effectively resolved underlying architectural trade-offs and constraints.
